SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Tracking_configuration.Steer_gear_ratio.comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Tracking_configuration.RPLB.comment: 1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground) / -1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)

failsafe.P_sys_deg_MaxSteeringWheelAngle.comment: Max value of the steering wheel angle

failsafe.P_sys_deg_MinSteeringWheelAngle.comment: Min value of the steering wheel angle

failsafe.P_sys_x_SteeringWheelAngleRange.comment: Parameter allowing to enable steering wheel angle range check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_VehicleSpeedCh.comment: Parameter allowing to enable vehicle speed checksum check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_VehicleSpeedCl.comment: Parameter allowing to enable vehicle speed clock check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_FourWVehicleSp.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.
Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaChecksumChe.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaClockCheckE.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.

safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.
Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.

vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

Debug_Protocols.Protocols_unlocking_MSB.comment: DID to unlock/lock the Debug protocols CCP and A087MB permanently.

Debug_Protocols.Protocols_unlocking_LSB.comment: DID to unlock/lock the Debug protocols CCP and A087MB permanently.

Mileage_snapshot.Mileage_snapshot.comment: Snapshot of the mileage taken at DTC occurrence

Alignment_in_plant_1.ElevationOffset.comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

Alignment_in_plant_2.AzimuthOffset.comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

AEBS_ACC_config_1.P_sys_x_AEBSEnable.comment: Parameter flag to enable the AEBS.

Configuration_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultCo.comment: Define if the radar is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0.

param_veh_1.P_sys_x_GearboxType.comment: Gearbox type (1 : means automatic gearbox, 0 : means manual gearbox)

failsafe.AfterSalesRoutineTimeout.comment: After sales routine cannot exceed a time.

failsafe.Blindness_algorithm_Ignition_On.comment: Number of ingition On before auto reactivate the blindness algorithm

RoutineAlignmentAferSales.vehicle_dyn_in.comment: vehicle dynamics intervention (EPS, ASR ABS, MSR active)

RoutineAlignmentAferSales.misalignment_a.comment: 0x00-0xFA(Hex) or 0-250 (0.01 degrees) / This is will be updated only after the successful completio

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

Param_sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor.comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

OutputTemporaryControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Param_sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSe.comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

AEBS18_FCWActivationInit.FCWActivationSt.comment: DID allowing to drive the value of FCWActivationState stored in NVM (FCWActivationValue_EEPROM)

AEBS19_FCWActivationAtEachStartEnable.P_.comment: Allow to activate/deactivate the auto reactivation of the FCW  at the ignition of the ECU.

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_vertic.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the measured offset at factory

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_horizo.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the measured offset at factory

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_horizo.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_vertic.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

lists.1: Alignment conditions not ready (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h)
lists.2: Alignment conditions not ready (System Failure detected)
lists.3: Alignment conditions not ready (Systen Failure detected and  (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h))

lists.2: Target setting offset in horizontal direction
lists.4: Mirror kept in the same Position

Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSPrefill.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS_Prefill action.

Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS1.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS1 action.

Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS2.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS2 action.

Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSCity.comment: Maximum time to execute the City action.

AEBS_ACC_config_2.P_sys_x_AEBSConfig.comment: Flag to determine the aebs function.

AEBS_ACC_config_2.P_sys_x_ACCEnable.comment: Parameter flag to enable the ACC strategy
